title: Comprehensive codebase review and author-metadata alignment
notes: Completed as a review-and-documentation track. Findings identified a main-dashboard policy-key mismatch, scenario/delta pages that currently compare parameterized status-quo runs rather than true policy regimes, a misleading jurisdiction selector on the landing page, limited dashboard-page E2E coverage, and several opportunities for stronger plain-language guidance. Repository metadata was also updated to use the correct Dylan A Mordaunt / Research Fellow, Faculty of Health, Education and Psychology, Victoria University of Wellington attribution.
